# Course Schedule {-}

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Week   Topic                             Writing       Exams and 
                                           Assignments   Important 
                                                         Dates     
------- --------------------------------- ------------- ------------------------
  1      Intro to Economics and Math 
         
  2      Opportunity Costs and PPFs          WA 1
         
  3      Gains from Trade and                              Labor Day
         Demand                                            No Class Monday 9/7
         
  4      Supply and Equilibrium              WA 2
         
  5      Elasticity of Demand                              Exam 1
                                                           Tuesday 9/22
         
  6      Other Elasticities and Economic    
         Surplus 
         
  7      Taxes                               WA 3      
         
  8      Price Controls                                    Fall Break No Class
                                                           Monday or Tuesday
                                                           10/12-13
         
  9      Externalities and Public Goods      WA 4                
  
  10     Costs and Production                              Exam 2
          in the Short Run                                 Tuesday 10/27
                                                                 
                                                                      
  11     Long Run Costs and Perfect
         Competition in the Short Run
         
  12     Perfect Competition in the           WA 5
         Long Run                  
         
  13     Monopolies
         
  14     Monopolistic Competition                           Thanksgiving Break 
                                                            No Class Wednesday-
                                                            Friday 11/27-11/29
  
  15     Oligopoly and Strategy               WA 6
  
  16     Finals Week                                        Exam 3
                                                            **Date**
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
